briefdescription.para: Make a copy of a struct. (Even though we initially pass is_owning: false, we then use the copy constructor to produce an owning instance.)
returns one of 2 basis unit vector that makes the biggest angle with the direction specified by this Generated from method MR.Vector2i64.furthestBasisVector.
returns same length vector orthogonal to this (rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise) Generated from method MR.Vector2i64.perpendicular.
Convert from a struct by copying it. Note that only ConstBox_Vector2i64 has this conversion, Box_Vector2i64 intentionally doesn't.
two-dimensional vector Generated from class MR.Vector2i64. This is the const reference to the struct.
